mutations.name: range_off_by_one
mutations.description: Off-by-one in BTreeMap range iterator: path.push((self, index)) instead of path.push((self, index - 1))

mutations.name: rrb_debug_pop
mutations.description: Side effect (pop_front) inside debug_assert_eq, disappears in release builds

mutations.name: ptr_eq_precedence
mutations.description: Missing parentheses in ptr_eq: && (a && b) || c instead of && ((a && b) || c)

mutations.name: eq_single_chunk
mutations.description: Missing iterator fallback in PartialEq for single-chunk case

removed_mutations.name: remove_action_priority
removed_mutations.reason: Not detectable: both priority orderings produce valid B-trees

removed_mutations.name: rrb_index_lookup
removed_mutations.reason: Not detectable: existing tests need complex RRB trees

removed_mutations.name: eq_precedence
removed_mutations.reason: Not detectable: weak PartialEq test coverage

removed_mutations.name: sort_var_scope
removed_mutations.reason: Incompatible with functional syntax: variable scope mutation
